//Sanity: Menu source of truth (§1/§12). Set ProjectId+Dataset to enable the real provider. Token is OPTIONAL (private datasets) and a SECRET — supply via user-secrets / Key Vault, never commit it. If unset in Development, a dev-only stub provider is used.
//Stripe: SecretKey and WebhookSecret are SECRETS and must stay empty in the repo (§5/§12) — supply via user-secrets locally / Key Vault in production (WP-7). WebhookSecret (whsec_...) verifies POST /api/webhooks/stripe; the webhook is the single source of truth for payment state.
//Resend: ApiKey is a SECRET and must stay empty in the repo (§2/§5/§12) — supply via user-secrets locally / Key Vault in production. Used to send order confirmation emails after the verified webhook marks an order paid. FromAddress must be a verified Resend sender; LookupBaseUrl is the public base for the guest order-lookup link. If unset in Development, a dev-only no-op email service logs instead of sending.
